title: helichrysum proliferum
intro: Helichrysum proliferum, also known as the crevice curry plant, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum proliferum have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and pain, improving skin health, and even supporting the immune system. Helichrysum proliferum is often used in herbal preparations like essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
